title: Bray & Cyber's 3D Books - Enchantments Encore Patch
description: This adds texture compatibility between Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books and the Enchantments Encore mod + Descriptions.
body:
This adds texture compatibility between [Bray & Cyber's Better, Fresher 3D Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books) and [Enchantments Encore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore), as well as adding descriptions via [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions).

I went through each new enchant and connected it with a texture from the 3D pack, and voila.

Also added descriptions for all of them so you don't have to keep going to the wiki.

I just wanted pretty books that had somethin' to say :p

Both EnchantedEncore and Enchantment Descriptions are required for this pack to work, otherwise you'll just have regular 3D books, which is... also good?

All credit goes to the original authors and designers of the packs down below.

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bray-cyber-3d-enchanted-books

https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore

https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions
